case_title: SOFIA GONZALEZ VS. WINFIELD DESIGN INTERNATIONAL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WINFIELD DESIGN INTERNATIONAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WINFIELD DESIGN INTERNATIONAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, SOFIA AS TO DEFENDANT WINFIELD DESIGN INTERNATIONAL SHUEN, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, SOFIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. ATTY EDWARD W. SUMAN APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT, AS HIS WAS NAMED ON THE CERTIFIED MAIL CARD. DEFENDANT THOMAS SHUEN, PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
